description: Revert tracks, phases, or tasks through Cadre packets

preconditions.requirement: Every project-scoped packet call includes root
If a required packet returns ok:false, halt and report the packet error

packetFlow.instruction: Resolve the project root with `cadre_project` using `action: "root"`.
Call `cadre_workflow` with `workflow: "revert"` and the requested `trackId`, commit, repo, or scope arguments as structured JSON fields.
Present the packet dry-run revert scope, planned git actions, affected canonical JSON artifacts, generated projections, warnings, and review_bundle manifest/path list.
To execute an approved revert, call `cadre_workflow` again with `workflow: "revert"`, `execute: true`, and `approvalComplete: true`.
Summarize reverted scope, tests requested or run, changed canonical JSON/JSONL artifacts, generated human projections, packet warnings, and follow-up packets.

forbiddenActions: Do not recreate Cadre control-plane, native event/message state, index, worktree, provider, merge, or cleanup state with shell commands
Do not read or write Markdown projections as canonical state
Do not use Markdown payload fields, legacy Markdown import, or prompt-side state repair
